title: Builders Dimension
description: Adds an empty dimension that you can build in and a couple of new totems to mess around with!
body:
![GET 15% OFF YOUR FIRST MONTH WITH CODE: GARTMAN](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76daa455cb80c6d3c27832e42f5089e734227b42.png)

By Using Code "GARTMAN" When Buying A Server You Are Not Only Getting A Discount, But Supporting Me In The Process!

[Get Your Server Now!](https://www.kinetichosting.net/)
 

This mod was made to add a dimension that anyone can build anything they want in. Venture out into your world to find the various totems scattered across your world after the lost builder perished. Befriend villagers and aquire a builders core to enter the builders dimension.


I will be adding more choices to the blocks you can build the portal out of in the future 

For anyone wondering, YES I will be making a fabric version as soon as possible

Don't be shy, show me what you were able to make with this mod. I would like to see how creative everyone can get!

I also recommend using JEI with this mod

 

You may use this mod in your modpack.
